violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Beverage dispenser was found dirty near nozzles. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Carpeting was installed as floor covering where not allowed. Storage area where food is stored has carpet on the floor. Carpeting should not be installed in food storage
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
